name: 4ok
description: Local governed company context tools for OpenClaw agents.

command.description: Executable used to run the GCB CLI.

commandArgs.description: Arguments placed before the GCB subcommand, for example ['run', 'gcb'] when command is 'uv'.

state.description: Local SQLite state path used when databaseUrl is unset.

databaseUrl.description: Optional SQLAlchemy database URL for the governed runtime.

rawStore.description: Raw-store path used by the health tool.

timeoutMs.description: Maximum time to wait for each local GCB CLI call.

commandArgs.label: GCB Command Args
commandArgs.help: Use ['run', 'gcb'] with command 'uv' when the package is not installed on PATH.
